2606.25657.title: Steering Vision-Language Models with Joint Sparse Autoencoders
2606.25657.paper_summary: Sparse Autoencoders (SAEs) have shown promise for analyzing language models, but applying them to vision-language models (VLMs) often yields representations that are difficult to use as controllable cross-modal steering directions. We introduce the Joint Sparse Autoencoder (JSAE), which uses an explicit alignment constraint to jointly factorize sequence-pooled vision and language activations into shared, interpretable image/caption-level features. Applied to LLaVA, JSAE recovers cross-modal features for recognizable concepts (e.g., food and animals). Through bidirectional interventions (additive steering and suppression), we observe a layer-dependent asymmetry under our protocol: additive steering peaks at mid-to-late (pre-output) layers and weakens at both ends, whereas suppression scores remain within a comparable range across all probed layers within statistical noise. Experiments on three VLMs, namely LLaVA-v1.6-Mistral-7B, Llama3-LLaVA-8B, and the MoE-based Qwen3-VL-30B, show related layer-localized effects across architectures. Together, these results suggest that explicitly aligned sparse representations support more controllable intervention-based analysis of multimodal features, within an identifiable layer range, than the unconstrained alternatives tested here.
2606.25657.paper_summary_zh: 稀疏自編碼器（SAEs）在分析語言模型方面顯示出潛力，但將其應用於視覺-語言模型（VLMs）時，通常會產生難以用作可控的跨模態引導方向的表示。我們介紹了聯合稀疏自編碼器（JSAE），它使用顯式對齊約束，將序列池化的視覺和語言激活共同分解為共享的、可解釋的圖像/標題級特徵。應用於LLaVA，JSAE恢復了可識別概念（例如，食物和動物）的跨模態特徵。通過雙向干預（加性引導和抑制），我們在我們的協議下觀察到層依賴的非對稱性：加性引導在中到後期（預輸出）層達到峰值，並在兩端減弱，而抑制分數在所有探測層內保持在可比範圍內，存在統計噪聲。在三個VLM上進行的實驗，即LLaVA-v1.6-Mistral-7B、Llama3-LLaVA-8B和基於MoE的Qwen3-VL-30B，顯示出不同架構之間的相關層局部效應。總體來看，這些結果表明，顯式對齊的稀疏表示支持比這裡測試的無約束替代方案更可控的基於干預的多模態特徵分析，並且在可識別的層範圍內。
2606.25657.author: Huizhen Shu et.al.
2606.25657.authors: Huizhen Shu, Xuying Li, Hongxu Lin, Wenjie Sun, Hui Li
